name: Content Card Grid
description: Responsive grid of registry content cards with type badges, namespace indicators, version info, and quick-action buttons. Used for browsing patterns, themes, blueprints, and other registry items.

standard.description: Registry content cards with type badge, namespace indicator, name, description, and version. Grid: 1/2/3 cols at sm/md/lg.

slots.card-type-badge: Type badge (pattern/theme/blueprint) with color-coded variant in CardHeader
slots.card-title: Content name with _heading4 styling, clickable link to detail
slots.card-meta: Version number, download count, and updated-at in CardFooter

compact.description: Compact list-style content cards with minimal info. Grid: 1/2/4 cols. Useful for dense browsing views.

slots.card-icon: Content type icon on the left

editable.description: Content cards with edit/delete actions for the user dashboard. Includes status indicator and publish date.

slots.card-actions: Edit and delete Button group in CardFooter
